title: The British Royal Family P2 2013 - Request

transcript.text: Hello, here's a video request from Betty 2. Hi, Betty 2.

But I guess I'll do it again, because it's another request.

The question is, the Queen of England and her family gangsters that make the mob look like amateurs.
As I look at her, I see she has people ready to kill in her name, like the Army, Navy, police, and protect her interests.
She also takes a cut of people's wages every payday for her and her family.
And if you try to get rid of her, she'll wipe you out.
These thing gangsters do, what do you think, Kyle?
Yeah, I remember seeing some videos on the Internet of people talking trash about, like, some friends of Alex Jones talking trash about the Royal Family, like they're bad.
And then, of course, David Icke says that they're the kings of the criminals of the world, and they even shapeshifted to reptilians and all this kind of stuff.
But I don't really, I don't, I've been studying a lot of history over the last couple of years.
And I just see the Royal Family as just a kind of a holdover from the past.

Kingdoms are the way that we had governments since the beginning of time.
You'd have the king, he's an autocratic king, and then they turn into constitutional monarchy,
And then countries transform into republic.

Because that's what it's always been called.
And they call it the king's land, you know, like officially it belongs to the king and stuff,

And that's, and all of the language, you know, the Royal Air Force and all this kind of stuff,
It's just, it's just, it's just the language.
The real people in power are the people who, are the Prime Minister, the people who make the day-to-day decisions.
The Royal Family are just, are just the ceremonial leaders.
I am, personally, I would consider myself a Royalist.
I think that we should keep the Royal Family, because in England, you know, maybe not in other countries,
But at least to keep one Royal Family in the world, keep them in England, because the, the, like, Prince William,
And I guess the little kid, Prince William's kid, who's going to pop out pretty soon,
